name: Iced Shapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and the sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg, a little at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the flour and lemon rind and mix to a firm dough.
4. Roll out on a lightly-floured surface to about 1/2 to 1/4 inch thickness and stamp out fancy shapes with biscuit cutters.
5. Place, well apart, on lightly greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes until firm and lightly browned. Leave to cool on a wire rack.
7. Place the icing sugar in a small bowl and gradually add water until the icing is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon. Adjust the consistency by adding more sugar or water. Add a few drops of food coloring, spread the icing on to the cooled biscuits, and decorate with colored balls.
Decoration: 4 ounces Icing sugar, 1 to 2 Tablespoons Warm water, Food coloring, Colored balls
